hero.title: Your phone calls. Handled.
hero.subtitle: AI agents that answer, qualify, and book — so you never miss a call again
hero.trustLine: Works with your existing number · No contracts · 14-day free trial
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent plans that scale with your revenue.
pricing.tier.starter.name: Starter
pricing.tier.starter.description: For solo operators who want AI to answer every call.
pricing.tier.growth.name: Growth
pricing.tier.growth.description: For growing teams that need reliable coverage and follow-up.
pricing.tier.scale.name: Scale
pricing.tier.scale.description: For teams that run on scheduled revenue and complex pipelines.
pricing.tier.enterprise.name: Enterprise
pricing.tier.enterprise.description: For organizations that need custom routing, security, and SLAs.
languageSwitcher.label: Language
onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.business.heading: Tell us about your business
onboarding.business.description: We use this to personalize how your AI answers the phone and introduces your company.
onboarding.agent.heading: Configure your first AI agent
onboarding.agent.description: Choose a template and customize how your agent talks, handles callers, and books appointments.
onboarding.knowledge.heading: Add knowledge
onboarding.knowledge.description: Give your agent the context it needs: FAQs, services, pricing, location, and more.
onboarding.phone.heading: Connect your phone
onboarding.phone.description: Provision a new number or connect an existing one so callers can reach your AI.
onboarding.test.heading: Make your first test call
onboarding.test.description: Call your own AI and see how it handles real conversations before going live.
onboarding.complete.heading: You’re ready to go live
onboarding.complete.description: Your AI is configured, connected, and ready to answer calls for your business.
onboarding.toast.complete: Onboarding complete. Redirecting to your dashboard.

dashboard.agentReady.title: Your AI agent is ready
dashboard.agentReady.description: Connect your phone number to start receiving real calls.
dashboard.agentReady.footnote: Businesses like yours recover $2,400+/month in missed calls.
dashboard.nextActions.title: What to do next
dashboard.nextActions.connectPhone.title: Connect your phone
dashboard.nextActions.connectPhone.body: Route your existing number or claim a new one so your AI can start answering real calls.
dashboard.nextActions.testCall.title: Make a test call
dashboard.nextActions.testCall.body: Hear the current greeting and confirm your call flow before going live.
dashboard.nextActions.shareTeam.title: Share with your team
dashboard.nextActions.shareTeam.body: Invite the people who should see leads, appointments, and inbox updates.
dashboard.seeLive.title: See it handled live
dashboard.seeLive.description: Watch the sample call walkthrough to hear how a real lead is answered, qualified, and booked before you connect your line.
dashboard.roi.title: Estimated ROI
dashboard.roi.body: Businesses at your stage typically recover $2,400+ a month once every missed call turns into a captured lead.

docs.quickStart.title: Quick start
docs.quickStart.subtitle: Get Recall Touch live in under 5 minutes.
docs.quickStart.step.signUp: Sign up and create your workspace.
docs.quickStart.step.connectPhone: Connect a phone number or port an existing one.
docs.quickStart.step.test: Make a test call and review the transcript.
docs.quickStart.step.launch: Point your business phone to Recall Touch and go live.
docs.api.title: API reference
docs.api.description: Learn how to integrate Recall Touch into your existing tools and workflows.
pricing.faq.title: Pricing questions
pricing.faq.trial: Do you offer a free trial?
pricing.faq.trialAnswer: Yes — all non-Enterprise plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.faq.overage: What happens if I go over my minutes?
pricing.faq.overageAnswer: We simply bill overage at your plan’s per-minute rate with no penalties.
pricing.faq.cancelAnswer: Yes — you can cancel or change plans at any time from the billing settings.

integrations.hub.title: Integrations
integrations.hub.subtitle: Connect Recall Touch with your CRM, calendar, messaging tools, and more.
integrations.card.salesforce.title: Salesforce
integrations.card.salesforce.body: Sync leads, contacts, and activities with your Salesforce CRM.
integrations.card.hubspot.title: HubSpot
integrations.card.hubspot.body: Keep HubSpot contacts and deals in sync with call outcomes.
integrations.card.zoho.title: Zoho CRM
integrations.card.zoho.body: Send qualified leads and appointments directly into Zoho CRM.
integrations.card.pipedrive.title: Pipedrive
integrations.card.pipedrive.body: Update deals based on call results and follow-up status.
integrations.card.googleContacts.title: Google Contacts
integrations.card.googleContacts.body: Sync your Google contacts so your AI knows who’s calling.
integrations.card.microsoft365.title: Microsoft 365
integrations.card.microsoft365.body: Connect Outlook contacts and calendars for full context.
integrations.card.gohighlevel.title: GoHighLevel
integrations.card.gohighlevel.body: Push qualified leads and calls into your GoHighLevel pipelines.
